member.name: T:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.ITranslationData
member.summary: Element data marker interface for .

member.name: T:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Languages
member.summary: Set of translators for one or more languages. Keys are the locale code e.g. "en_GB", "fr_FR", etc. and values are the translators for those languages.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Languages._translators
member.summary: Internal dictionary of translators.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Languages.AddLanguage(System.String,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator)
member.summary: Add a language and its translator to the set of languages.
member.param: Locale code for the language e.g. "en_GB", "fr_FR", etc.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Languages.TryGetTranslator(System.String,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator@)
member.summary: Gets the translator for the specified language if it exists. Returns true if it does, otherwise false.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.MissingTranslationBehaviour
member.summary: Defines the behaviour of the translation engine when a translation is missing for a value.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.MissingTranslationBehaviour.Original
member.summary: Use the original value if there is no translation for it. This is the default behaviour.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.MissingTranslationBehaviour.EmptyString
member.summary: Use an empty string if there is no translation for the value.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.MissingTranslationBehaviour.FlowError
member.summary: Add a flow error if there is no translation for the value. The error contains the reason there was no translation.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.TranslationData
member.summary: Data object populated by .

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.TranslationData.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.TranslationData},FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline)
member.summary: Create a new instance.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.TranslationData.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.ElementDataBase},FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Create a new instance using an existing dictionary.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.TranslationProperty
member.summary: Defines a translation from one property to another.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.TranslationProperty.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.TranslationProperty.SourceProperty
member.summary: Source property name on the source element data.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.TranslationProperty.DestinationProperty
member.summary: Destination property name on translation engine data.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator
member.summary: Translator used to translate values based on a set of translations. The translator supports translating various string types. The result is the same type as the source e.g. a string will be translated to a string, a list of strings will be translated to a list of strings, etc.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator._translations
member.summary: Internal translation dictionary.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator._behaviour
member.summary: The behaviour to use when a translation is missing.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator.#ctor(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.MissingTranslationBehaviour)
member.summary: Default constructor. Initializes the translator with an empty set of translations.
member.param: The behaviour to use when a translation is missing.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.MissingTranslationBehaviour)
member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: The translations to use for translation. The key is the source value and the value is the translated value.
The behaviour to use when a translation is missing.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator.Translate(System.Object,System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Exception})
member.summary: Translate the object to the language this translator is configured for. The translator supports translating various string types. The result is the same type as the source e.g. a string will be translated to a string, a list of strings will be translated to a list of strings, etc. For AspectPropertyValue types, if the value has no value, then the no value message will be copied to the result.
member.param: List of errors to add to if any errors are encountered during translation.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator.TranslateTyped(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Exception})
member.summary: String type. This is the base type for translation, so the other types will call this method.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator.TranslateTyped(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Exception})
member.summary: String list type.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator.TranslateTyped(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Data.IAspectPropertyValue{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Exception})
member.summary: Aspect property value string type.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator.TranslateTyped(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Data.IAspectPropertyValue{System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String}},System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Exception})
member.summary: Aspect property value string list type.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator.TranslateTyped(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Data.IAspectPropertyValue{System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IWeightedValue{System.String}}},System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Exception})
member.summary: Aspect property value weighted strings type.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator.CopyNoValue``1(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Engines.Data.IAspectPropertyValue{``0})
member.summary: Copy the no value message from the source value to the destination.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.ITranslationEngine
member.summary: Flow element that translates values from a single source element and stores translated values under its own element data key. See for implementation details.

member.name: P:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.ITranslationEngine.SourceElementDataKey
member.summary: Element data key of the source flow element.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine
member.summary:
Flow element that translates values from a single source element and stores translated values under its own element data key.
Translations are provided in YAML format files, where the naming defines the language contained in the file. See .
The language to translate to is deteined by looking through the evidence for a key containing a locale code. The keys checked are defined in . If a fixed language is provided in the builder, this will be used instead, regardless of the evidence.
The properties to be translated are configured in the builder by supplying the name of the input property, and the name of the output property. See .
The element that the input properties are fetched from is configured by supplying the element data key. See .
Only string based types are supported for translation e.g. string, IList string, IAspectPropertyValue string, etc. and the type of the output property will match the input.
The behaviour of the engine when a translation is missing for a value can be configured using the enum. See .

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine._emptyTranslator
member.summary: Translator with no translations configured. Used to populate translations when there is no target language or translator available, to ensure the output properties are always populated with a value, even if that value is just an error message.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine._fixedLanguage
member.summary: Locale code of the fixed translation language, if provided.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine._behaviour
member.summary: Defines the behaviour when there is no translation available for a value.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine._translationProperties
member.summary: Input and output property names to translate.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine._evidenceKeyWhiteListValues
member.summary: The keys which should be used to get the locale code for the language to translate to.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine._localeRegex
member.summary: Regex used to identify language locale codes in evidence

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine.Languages
member.summary: Translation lookups
Create a new translationLookupKey engine.
member.param: Element data key of the source flow element.
Translations to execute, keyed by source property name.
Fixed language to translate to. If this is set, the engine will always translate to this language. Otherwise (null or empty) the engine will get the language from the evidence.
The behaviour of the translation engine when a translation is missing for a value.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine.ParseSources(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.IO.FileInfo},FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.MissingTranslationBehaviour)
member.summary: Unpacks and parses source files into a Languages instance containing a Translator for each file.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine.GetLanguageName(System.String)
member.summary: Get the language locale code from the source file name.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine.ValidateLocale(System.String)
member.summary: Get the validated locale code.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine.TryGetSourceValue(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IElementData,System.String,System.Object@)
member.summary: Gets the source value from the sourcedata

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine.Populate(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IElementData,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.Translator,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.ITranslationData,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IFlowData)
member.summary: Populates the translation data wither all configured translations using the provided translator.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine.TryGetTargetLanguage(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IFlowData,System.String@)
member.summary: Goes through the Evidence in the FlowData to find the highest precidence evidence key and sets the target language.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngine.TryGetSourceData(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IFlowData,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IElementData@)
member.summary: Retrieves the source value data from the FlowData.

member.name: T:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngineBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder for .

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngineBuilder._translationProperties
member.summary: List of properties to translate.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngineBuilder._sourceElementDataKey
member.summary: Key to the source element which the translation engine will read from. This is where the values to be translated come from.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngineBuilder._sources
member.summary: Source files containing translations. These follow the naming convention 'abc.en_GB.yml' where 'abc' can be any idenitifier, 'en_GB' is the locale code, and 'yml' is the file extension. The locale code is used to determine which language is contained in the translation files. Files must be in YAML format.

member.name: F:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngineBuilder._behaviour
member.summary: The behaviour of the translation engine when a translation is missing for a value.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngineBuilder.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Constructor.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngineBuilder.SetSourceElementDataKey(System.String)
member.summary: Set source element data key.
member.param: Key to the source element which the translation engine will read from. This is where the values to be translated come from.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngineBuilder.SetFixedLanguage(System.String)
member.summary: Set a fixed language for the translation engine to translate to. If this is set, the engine will not determine the language to translate to from the source element data, it will instead always translate to this language.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngineBuilder.SetMissingTranslationBehaviour(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.MissingTranslationBehaviour)
member.summary: Set the behaviour of the translation engine when a translation is missing for a value.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngineBuilder.AddTranslation(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add translated property. This defines a translation from one property to another.
member.param: The key for the source property to translate.
The key to store the translated value under on the translation engine data.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngineBuilder.AddSource(System.String)
member.summary: Add a source file containing translations. These follow the naming convention 'abc.en_GB.yml' where 'abc' can be any idenitifier, 'en_GB' is the locale code, and 'yml' is the file extension. The locale code is used to determine which language is contained in the translation files. Files must be in YAML format. The source can contain a wildcard to add multiple files e.g. 'abc.*.yml' to add all languages for the 'abc' identifier.

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngineBuilder.CreateData(FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.IPipeline,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.FlowElements.FlowElementBase{FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.Data.ITranslationData,FiftyOne.Pipeline.Core.Data.IElementPropertyMetaData})
member.summary: Creates an instance of ElementData

member.name: M:FiftyOne.Pipeline.Translation.FlowElements.TranslationEngineBuilder.Build
member.summary: Build a translation engine.
